script.openingLine: Welcome back to Replay: Belgium meet Senegal in the round of 32 at Seattle Stadium.

moments.spokenLine: Belgium meet Senegal in the round of 32 at Seattle Stadium.
moments.explainer: The replay begins with both sides level at the start of the round of 32.

moments.spokenLine: Habib DIARRA scores for Senegal, and the verified score moves to 0–1.
moments.explainer: Senegal take the lead, giving them the first advantage of the match.

moments.spokenLine: Belgium trail Senegal 0–1 at the interval.
moments.explainer: Senegal carry their one-goal lead into half-time.

moments.spokenLine: Ismaila SARR scores for Senegal, and the verified score moves to 0–2.
moments.explainer: Senegal double their lead, putting Belgium two goals behind.

moments.spokenLine: Brandon MECHELE is shown a card for Belgium.
moments.explainer: Belgium receive a disciplinary setback while trailing 0–2.

moments.spokenLine: Lamine CAMARA is shown a card for Senegal.
moments.explainer: Senegal are also shown a card as they hold a 2–0 lead.

moments.spokenLine: Romelu LUKAKU scores for Belgium, moving the verified score to 1–2.
moments.explainer: Belgium reduce the deficit to one goal.

moments.spokenLine: Youri TIELEMANS scores for Belgium, and the verified score moves to 2–2.
moments.explainer: Belgium draw level after trailing Senegal 0–2.

moments.spokenLine: A Belgium player is shown a card.
moments.explainer: The match remains level at 2–2 as Belgium receive another card.

moments.spokenLine: Youri TIELEMANS scores for Belgium, moving the verified score to 3–2.
moments.explainer: Belgium move in front after recovering from a 0–2 deficit.
Belgium finish ahead after turning a 0–2 deficit into a 3–2 victory.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Belgium meet Senegal in the round of 32 at Seattle Stadium.
In the 24th minute, Habib DIARRA scores for Senegal, and the verified score moves to 0–1.
In the 51st minute, Ismaila SARR scores for Senegal, and the verified score moves to 0–2.
In the 64th minute, Brandon MECHELE is shown a card for Belgium.
In the 67th minute, Lamine CAMARA is shown a card for Senegal.
In the 86th minute, Romelu LUKAKU scores for Belgium, moving the verified score to 1–2.
In the 89th minute, Youri TIELEMANS scores for Belgium, and the verified score moves to 2–2.
In the 90th minute, A Belgium player is shown a card.
In the 5th minute of extra-time stoppage time, Youri TIELEMANS scores for Belgium, moving the verified score to 3–2.
